creator: matthias@petermann.it
text:
Approved (new Maintainer E-Mail-Address is matthias@petermann-it.de)

Am 10.08.2013 01:00, schrieb Edwin Groothuis:
> Maintainer of finance/trytond_account,
>
> Please note that PR ports/181173 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/181173
>
